content.en:
Outside the Heavenly Dao Tree.

As soon as Ye Tian appeared, the surrounding Void Demons rushed over, wanting to kill Ye Tian.

Suddenly.

Yama Sanyi waved his hand and directly exerted the ability of spatial transformation, moving Ye Tian to his side.

This is also a kind of use of spatial talent, Ye Tianhui has this ability, and Yama San has a god-level spatial talent, so naturally he will also have this ability.

"How?"

Yamasan hurriedly asked.

"It worked!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Okay, then let's leave, these void demons are too annoying, and they can't be killed!"

Yamasan said.

Whew!!

Yamasan took Ye Tian through the encirclement with ease, and the strength of these void demons was too weak to catch up with Yamasan.

Soon, Yama-san got rid of these void demons and successfully left the area.

......

Another area of the Void.

Yamasan stopped, and then couldn't wait to ask, "Ye Yi, have you really obtained the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart?"

It still can't believe it, although Ye Tian said that he got it, but he didn't see the real thing, it was still a little unsure.

"This is Heavenly Dao Mu Xin!"

Ye Tian took out the Heavenly Dao Mu Xin and put it in front of Yama San.

Then.

Yama San stared at Tiandao Muxin and muttered, "Yes, it's really Tiandao Muxin, in the records of the clan, Tiandao Muxin is like this." "

After staring at it for a while, Yama San said, "Ye Yi, according to the regulations, we will each have half." One Heavenly Dao Wood Heart is enough for ten clansmen to raise their Yu-level cultivation talent to the Chaos level, and they are not afraid to waste this Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!"

After saying that, Yama San cut off the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart into two!

Yamasan put away a section by himself, and Ye Tian also put away a section.

"Hahaha, yes, this time I entered the void realm, but I didn't expect to harvest the Heavenly Dao Mu Heart. Ye Yi, let's go, I'll take you to play for a while, there are a lot of good places in the Void, I'll take you to recognize the way!" Yamasan said happily.

"Okay!"

Ye Tian nodded.

It's not good for him to leave at this time, otherwise it will easily arouse Yamasan's suspicion, anyway, now that a year has passed, it's okay to go out later.

When Yama San took Ye Tian to play around in the Void Realm, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race discussed Ye Tian's matter for a long time.

When the one-year period had just arrived, His Highness of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and the inheritance Dao of the Nine Supreme Powers came out of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, except for one Ye Tian.

After inquiry, no one had ever seen Ye Tian.

At the beginning, those highnesses and inheritance Dao Zi thought that Ye Tian had fallen in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, some people regretted it, some people gloated, and some people were even extremely happy.

This matter also attracted the attention of the Supremes, so many Supremes began to deduce Ye Tian's situation.

The final result was that Ye Tian had not fallen, and was still in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World!

As for Ye Tian's current situation, no one knows.

Thereupon.

The Kunwu Supreme sent people to wait for the entrance and exit of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, but he didn't wait for Ye Tian to come out.

The supreme hall of the human race, the Kunwu Palace.

Several supreme beings were in a meeting to discuss Ye Tian's affairs.

"Kunwu Supreme, is there any news of Ye Tian?"

Spell Supreme asked.

"No!" Kunwu Supreme shook his head, "Ye Tian is still in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, it is very strange, it stands to reason that everyone can only stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for one year, and when the time is up, they will be expelled from the Heavenly Dao Fragment World by the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, how could Ye Tian exceed a year, this breaks the restrictions of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World!"

"Could it be that Ye Tian has entered some strange place, which is not restricted by the Heavenly Dao, so he can stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World all the time!" the Blue Emperor Supreme guessed.

"Is there such a place in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, since the Terrans discovered the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, no one has ever discovered such a place!"

"Anyway, one thing is certain, that is, Ye Tian is fine. Let's wait slowly, maybe Ye Tian will come back soon. When the time comes, we'll ask about the situation!" Spell Supreme suggested.

"That's all there is to it!"

Kungo Supreme nodded.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, Ye Tian stayed in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for another two years.

In the past two years, Yama San took Ye Tian to many Void Realm Regions, allowing Ye Tian to have a deeper understanding of the Void Realm Regions, and also went to many strange places, some of which were even of great help to cultivation.

But even so, the Void Region that Yama-san had visited was just a drop in the ocean.

this day.

Ye Tian said goodbye to Yamasan: "Yamasan, I'm going to leave first!"

"Okay, I also have to go back to refining the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!"

Yamasan nodded.

Immediately, Yamasan sent Ye Tian back to the Void Realm where he was before, so that after leaving the Void Realm, he would return to the place he had entered, which was due to the rules of the Void Realm.

After sending Ye Tian back, Yamasan left.

After Yamasan left, Ye Tian put all the Heavenly Dao Leaves in his Chaos Ancient Realm, and used the power of the Chaos Black Lotus to block the Heavenly Dao Leaves.

Without the blessing of Heavenly Dao Ye, Ye Tian was unable to compete with the Void Heavenly Dao and was rejected by the Void Heavenly Dao.

Swish!

Ye Tian felt a huge repulsion coming, and his body entered a spatial tunnel uncontrollably.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian found that he had left the Void Realm and returned to the main space of the universe.

Suddenly, a voice came.

"Your Highness, you're finally back!"

Ye Tian fixed his eyes and saw that it was his own guard, the Dark Master!

"Well, it's back, let's go back to the Supreme Hall of the Terrans!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!"

The Lord of Darkness nodded in response.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and the Dark Lord to return to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race.

For the first time, the Kunwu Supreme summoned Ye Tian.

Kungo Temple.

Ye Tian stood in front of several supremes, waiting for the questions of several supremes.

He knew very well that these Supremes had many doubts now, such as why he could stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for a few years, where he had been in the past few years, what he had done, and so on.

Kunwu Supreme stared at Ye Tian, examined it for a while, and then said, "Ye Tian, you have been in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for several years, how did you stay in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race? "

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Kunwu Supreme, in fact, there is nothing that cannot be said, the reason why I can stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for a few years is because of this thing!"

Ye Tian took out the Heavenly Dao Leaf and handed it to the Kunwu Supreme, saying, "This leaf is called the Heavenly Dao Leaf, it is the leaf that grows on the Heavenly Dao Tree, which can allow a creature to stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World forever and will not be excluded from the Void Realm!"

"What, there's something like that!"

Kungo Supreme They were shocked.

Immediately, they carefully studied the Heavenly Dao Leaf.

"With the power of the Heavenly Dao, this thing should have been born in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, and the Heavenly Dao Tree you just said, what's going on?" Kun Wu Supreme asked curiously.

Then, Ye Tian briefly talked about the situation.

Of course, he won't tell the story exactly as it is, otherwise there is something that cannot be explained.

For example, Xukun!

Kunwu Supreme and the others may know about Xukun, if he said that he entered the Void Demon Clan with Xukun, then how can he explain that he has gained Xukun's trust?

Disguise?

Don't be kidding, if you don't have a talent for information sharing, no matter how you disguise it, you will be discovered by Xukun.

And as a human being, how can you have a talent for information sharing?

Therefore, he must not reveal that he has the help of Xukun!

So, Ye Tian said that he met a dead Xukun, obtained some inheritance from Xukun's internal space, knew the situation of the Void Realm, and then obtained the Heavenly Dao Leaf, and survived in the Void for a long time with the help of the power of the Heavenly Dao Leaf, and obtained a lot of Heavenly Dao words.

"Kunwu Supreme, this is the remaining Heavenly Dao Leaf, I am going to dedicate it to the human race!"

Ye Tian took out nearly a thousand Heavenly Dao leaves, and only a little bit was left for himself.

Then, Ye Tian recorded the basic situation about the Void Realm into a message and handed it to the Kunwu Supreme.

"Ye Tian, the information you said is very important, and it is of great help to our human race to enter the Void Realm. Now, even the Protoss doesn't know much about the Void Realm, and our Terran Race's exploration on the Void Realm has suddenly come to the forefront of the Universe Clan!" said Kun Wu Supreme excitedly.

Next, Kunwu Supreme asked them about the situation again, and Ye Tian answered them one by one.

But from beginning to end, Ye Tian did not reveal the matter of the Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid and the Heavenly Dao Mu Xin.

After all, the Heavenly Dao Golden Liquid was of great help to Ye Tian, and the Heavenly Dao Mu Xin was useless to him, but it was very important to the people of the Heavenly Pavilion.

Although he has the ability to deprive and give, this ability must not be used more than those close to him, otherwise once it is exposed, it will definitely be very troublesome.

Moreover, the deprivation of the bestowed ability is not something out of nothing, but still requires the talent of others.

Unless it was Ye Tian's enemy, he would not use such an ability.

And Tiandao Muxin has no worries, so you can use it with confidence.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Kunwu Hall and returned to the Xuan-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

For the first time, Ye Tian used a large number of points to exchange for a space supernatural power-the Spear of Hell Divine Sky!

The power of this great divine power is extremely terrifying, with a terrifying tearing power, once the enemy is hit by the Hell's Divine Sky Spear, the body will be torn apart by the terrifying power of the law of space for countless years, and sent into the depths of many spaces, which cannot be healed at all.

It can be said that even if it is an almost immortal person, once he is hit by the great power of space, he will not be able to recover from his immortality, which is equivalent to being sealed in hundreds of millions of spaces.

Ye Tian exchanged this space great divine power, naturally he wanted to cultivate.

However, he only has one Void Heaven Dao text now, if there are several Void Heaven Dao words, then he can directly cultivate the Space Great Divine Power, and he will soon be able to cultivate successfully.

But now, Ye Tian, who only has one Void Heavenly Dao text, can only slowly use this Empty Heavenly Dao text, as well as comprehend the laws of space, and rely on the long years to slowly comprehend the space great divine power, which is also one of the ways to cultivate the space great divine power.
